center.name: 帕凯山
center.summary: 帕凯山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括纹耳噪鹛、褐顶噪鹛、黄喉噪鹛等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Patkai range, where its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in central China and the Himalayas (where it winters in the southern foothills, as well as in southern Yunnan, the Patkai and northern Indochina

birds.label: 分布于

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in grassy areas with bushes and trees, scrub and forest in the Patkai mountain range. Until recently, it included the blue-crowned laughingthrush as a subspecies, but unlike that species the crown of the yellow-throated laughingthrush is pale grey (not bluish)
